steps.expected: Plan A updated with failure status and alternative
Plan B unaffected by changes to Plan A

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit (50 requests/day) prevents AI plan generation. All attempts to generate a plan via /api/chat returned HTTP 429 'Rate limited, try again in a moment'. The API key has no remaining quota for today.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried plan generation multiple times over 10+ minutes; rate limit persisted. Attempted to create plans directly via Supabase REST API but was blocked by RLS policies requiring authenticated JWT.

summary: Tested 0 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 5 blocked. All assertions blocked by OpenRouter API rate limit preventing plan generation. The test user (test+recovery3@example.com) was successfully created and authenticated, but plan generation - a prerequisite for all assigned assertions - is unavailable due to external API quota exhaustion.
